title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.392 - Christopher S. Bond Bridge designated for I-29/35 bridge in Kansas City
text:
227.392.  Christopher S. Bond Bridge designated for I-29/35 bridge in Kansas City. — The new bridge carrying Interstate 29/35 over the Missouri River in the home rule city with more than four hundred thousand inhabitants and located in more than one county shall be designated the "Christopher S.  Bond Bridge". Costs for such designation shall be paid by private donation.
(L. 2007 H.B. 56)
